results.title: update_market() market weight incorrect
results.reasoning: Yes. The audit report explicitly identifies the same issue in Finding #16: update_market passes block-number-based epochs to GaugeController.gauge_relative_weight_write, which expects timestamp-based epochs. This unit mismatch causes gauge weights to resolve to zero (mapping to 1970 weeks), preventing reward accumulation. It references the same function and call path, the same root cause, the same impact (no rewards accrued), and proposes the same fix (align to timestamps/convert epochs). Fixing the report’s issue would fix the described vulnerability.

results.title: update_market() nextEpoch calculation incorrect
results.reasoning: Yes. The report’s Issue 5 (“Epoch Boundary Miscalculation…”) describes the same bug in update_market(): nextEpoch is computed as i + BLOCK_EPOCH instead of aligning to the epoch boundary (epoch + BLOCK_EPOCH / ((i/BLOCK_EPOCH)+1)*BLOCK_EPOCH). It explains that this applies the wrong cantoPerBlock and gauge weight across epoch transitions, inflating accCantoPerShare—exactly the [H-02] issue. Same function, same code path, same root cause, and the same fix.
